name: Minecraft Paper (Auto-Update)
author: pterodactylhub@gmail.com
description: Paper is a high-performance fork of the Spigot Minecraft Server that aims to fix gameplay and mechanics inconsistencies as well as to improve performance. Auto-downloads latest build on start.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq
cd /mnt/server
BUILD=$(curl -s https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MC_VERSION}/builds | jq -r '.builds[-1].build')
curl -o server.jar https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${MC_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD}/downloads/paper-${MC_VERSION}-${BUILD}.jar
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The version of Minecraft to install. Example: 1.20.4

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jar file.
